title: Booked
description: Gives books a held item model.
body:
This pack gives a fresh new handheld model for books, while retaining the item texture for when it's not equipped.

Features a new model/texture for the base book, writable book, written book, and enchanted book.

![Book and quill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c07cb62cf5c6759c7c3c5d15797b3984cadf5712.png)
